summary: Project involves a technician/field service app with photo upload and job tracking features.

existing_features.title: Remove the 'Technician Signature' field entirely from the report form (ReportForm.tsx) — remove its UI input, any associated state, and all references to it in the PDF generation logic (pdfGenerator.ts).

Replace the single photo upload input in ReportForm.tsx with a multi-photo upload control that allows the user to select and add multiple images. Each uploaded photo should be stored as an individual entry in state.

For each uploaded photo in the multi-photo list, provide a text input field so the user can enter a description or label for that specific photo. Store the label alongside the photo in state and include both the image and its label in the generated PDF report.
Find all occurrences of the label 'HELPER' in the form UI (ReportForm.tsx) and the PDF generator (pdfGenerator.ts) and replace them with 'ASSIS TECHNICIAN'.

new_feature_requests.summary: Allow user to upload multiple pictures
Add description or label to each uploaded picture
